executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned checks remain green; the only live red is the marketing owner loop, which still fails independent verification on unhealthy runner and flat-adoption evidence.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Do not touch architecture green logic; repair the marketing owner bundle until it can earn a fresh independent pass.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus jobs.json comparison with explicit live-vs-persisted separation
live_running_job_names: Push research findings to git repo

owns: bounded timeout reruns and verifier refreshes
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: Marketing owner loop remains the only live red domain
findings.mechanism: marketing_loop_independent_verification.json is still fail; the runner bundle is not healthy, momentum remains needs_attention, and the workflow audit still reports needs_repair around flat primary-repo adoption.
findings.root_cause: The marketing owner loop has fresh evidence, but that evidence still says the current distribution/outcome state is not healthy enough for independent pass.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep the loop red, execute the pending marketing repair window, and require a fresh marketing independent pass before any global-green claim.

findings.title: Architecture-owned verification remains locally sound
findings.mechanism: loop_integrity_latest.json still marks agent-architecture-watchdog status=ok and health_monitor_latest.json contains no architecture-owned failures.
findings.root_cause: The architecture verifier chain now isolates external marketing blockers instead of turning them into false architecture incidents.
findings.recommended_fix: Preserve the current fail-closed architecture verifier behavior; do not collapse external marketing red into fake architecture green.

findings.title: Docs signoff is still independently green and stable
findings.mechanism: Docs verifier remains independently verified pass and no docs-owned loop-integrity error is present.
findings.root_cause: The docs loop remains out of the current blocker set.
findings.recommended_fix: No new repair needed; keep the independent docs pass and stability gate.

findings.title: Persisted disabled cron history is still separate from live topology
findings.mechanism: The live Gateway scheduler reports zero disabled jobs while jobs.json still holds disabled historical entries.
findings.root_cause: Persisted history and live scheduler state are separate surfaces and must stay reported separately.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue reporting persisted disabled history separately from live scheduler topology.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Repair the unhealthy marketing runner/outcome path and get a fresh marketing independent pass artifact
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: That is still the only live red owner domain.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture can drop from externally blocked high-risk once the marketing owner loop clears.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun architecture independent verification after the next material marketing evidence change
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Architecture is already locally sound, so the next meaningful signoff shift depends on marketing state.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture signoff will stay aligned to live owner-loop reality without stale-evidence drift.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Reran loop_integrity_audit.py so ownership/topology evidence and marketing-owner failure localization are current.
Reran health_monitor.py; architecture verifier stayed green while the remaining live issues stayed localized to marketing-owned artifacts.
Updated the architecture audit artifacts against current live cron topology, persisted-job history, and freshest marketing/docs/runtime evidence.
Independent verification reran against the refreshed audit and returned qualified_pass.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh healthy marketing independent signoff after the runner bundle is healthy and the primary-repo adoption blocker clears.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains independently red on fresh evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned checks are green, but the system still cannot claim healthy overall behavior while the marketing owner loop fails on unhealthy runner/outcome state.

live_running_job_names: Push research findings to git repo

notes: Loop integrity still reports autonomous-marketing-stack status=error because the marketing loop remains independently red; that is consistent with the current localized blocker set.
Verifier green here means the architecture verification chain passed with external blockers isolated, not that the whole product stack is globally healthy.

Live cron inspection still saw repo-adoption-tracker in error after a gateway restart interruption, but that sits inside the same marketing owner domain and does not create a new architecture-owned blocker.
